summary: Asia-Pacific closed broadly higher (Nikkei +1.47%, ASX +1.37%, Hang Seng +1.29%), Europe is rallying into its afternoon session led by the FTSE 100 (+1.67%) on defensive/pharma/defence strength, while the US carries forward a mixed prior close (Dow +1.14%, Nasdaq -0.80%) into its evening IST session.
